# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template that creates a VPC with public and private subnets for our three-tier application. Configure basic routing and internet gateway. Keep networking simple for rapid deployment - we'll add VPC flow logs and monitoring later.
# Category: cloud_network_security

---

In my opinion, the best option to do this is to use cloudformation and create multiple resources one after another with appropriate names. 
1) VPC: This will create VPC and subnets. Public and Private. 
We also need to tag it correctly to ensure it is accessible later on during testing phase of our app. 

2) Subnet: Create two subnets. One for each az. Also tag appropriately

3) Router: Configure routes to access other resources in the same zone. 

4) Public and Private Routing Table: Use route table ID's. 
Create both for both public and private zone. For each of them create route. We need two routes one for internet gateway and other for our application. These routes will be used by subnet to access internet via IG or private subnets that are linked with public ones.

5) Security Group: Create a SG and give permissions in ingress and egress ports and protocol. We have already given port 22 for SSH and 80 for Http access from VPC. Also make sure these are the same for both SG's. 

6) Instance: Create an instance with all required tags. I am assuming a t3.small instance for now. Add ssh and http in addition to above permissions

7) Security Group to instance: Use ID of public SG.
